raw_input:
[5.0/5] Terrific results from a very unique design I have been a huge fan of the relatively inexpensive, paperish, hugely saturated facial masks by companies like My Beauty Diary and others ( you can find my many positive reviews) until stumbling upon these lacey, saturated, fantastic masks.

I really can't contribute more than other outstanding reviewers have elaborated on the technical advantages of these lacey versions compared to the paper ones except to say how wonderful it is to position the mask over your face and neck and then be able to gently secure it by pulling it over your ears. Genious. The paper masks were good except the chin area never stays in place and I'm always checking to make sure the rest of it hasn't slid around on my face.

These cost a little more but the results were so great after my first one, I immediately purchased 3 more boxes of this version and another one to try out.

I am way past 50, but my skin looks terrific. Smooth, soft, healthy and glowing. I could not be happier. Go ahead and give these a try. But you better hurry before I buy them all up. [5.0/5] Amazing and Hydrating This is the first time using this product and I was pleasantly surprised. When I received the box the first thing I liked was the packaging. Adorable box with cute cartoons on it and the individual mask package is really nice as well.

How I used it. First washed my face and dried it. Then gently took the lace mask out of the package and peeled the backing off. The mask is loaded with product on it and I didn't waste a bit and put excess from the bag on my hands and arms as well. I padded the mask down on my face and attached the part for you ears to secure it on your face. Then went to relax for the next 15-20min and enjoyed the feeling. When you take the mask off do not wash off the serum instead run it into your face.

I've never used this brand before but I'm officially hooked! I've just turned 30 so I'm taking my skin care more seriously these days and very happy I found these masks. It's been a week since I've used it and my face is still feeling and looking great. I've started to purchase their other masks to see what I like best. I have nothing bad to say about this product it worked very well for me and I did notice a difference in my face. It also really liked the strap that goes under your chin. When I took it off it felt like it lifted and tightened my skin with still being extremely hydrated.
Try it, it's great. [5.0/5] PINKGO Girl white yogurt face mask Of all the PINKGO Girl sheet masks, this one is my favorite and seems the most effective. It is very luxurious. [3.0/5] Nice but not for sensitive skin This is the first time that I've used a mask from this line. And I have to admit that the packaging influenced my purchase:)
I really like the feel of the serum and the light fragrance. I, unlike other reviewers, couldn't fit it over my ears. Also the eye holes were way too small. Tip: use the peeI off backing and laid it on my neck and chest.
Left it on for 10 minutes and when I removed it I have small bumps all over my face, but now after 30 minutes, they seem to be going away. Once the serum dries it does feel a little tight on your face but it does not dry out the skin. I finished with a rich moisturizer to "seal the deal." The next morning my face felt very soft but still had a few bumps around the mouth area. My advice would be for those who have dry, sensitive skin, might want to be weary of this mask. Not the mask's fault, mind you, just not a good match for my skin. I would have given it 5 stars but took one off because of the bumps... [5.0/5] Awesome face mask I actually bought this in the brand's variety pack. They are all great but this one stands out in my opinion. It feels amazing on and my skin feels great after I take it off. [5.0/5] Magic mask Amazing! You will see the results from the first time [5.0/5] Works! Felt the firming and moisturizing of my skin minutes, and hours later My delight with this lace face mask was beyond expectation, I do recommend it.
5 packs came in the box I will continue to use this product, I’m even going to share a pack with my sister and best friend. Perfect for busy moms like us who need a little fun and self-pampering once in a while!

I’m used to to gel and cream masks that you leave on, so this concept was new to me and I have to admit it was a unique and very cool experience. It was very easy to use: wash face, then simply apply the lace mask over face, leave on for 15 mins and done.

I was laughing and making faces at my family with the dainty pretty lace sheet on haha, it was fun and funny. The cotton material is stretchy so it fit on my face just perfect and The best part is it had no smell, it stayed on my face while I walked around the house, and after I took it off and wiped my face clean I did feel good about it and felt the firming and moisturizing of my skin minutes, and hours later.

If this review was helpful please give a thumbs up thank you [3.0/5] ... for my face and didn't notice much benefit but adorable lace pattern A little small for my face and didn't notice much benefit but adorable lace pattern! [1.0/5] Vendor gone bad!?!? 04/28/2016-UPDATE: I just received my 5th order of this mask in 5 months and while I still like it very much, the formulation has changed from a lovely light serum gel to a more watery, less slickery one. With the other boxes, there was still an abundance of serum on my face after wearing for 20-25 mins to massage in along with my finishing serum. Now its dry in places after that time has elapsed. I hope the next box is the old formula.
06/10/2016-UPDATE: 6th order is the same watery texture but a new addition is a medicinal, Mercurochrome smell. Very odd. It seems to be working okay, but not as great as the first several orders.

I have tried many types of sheet masks with good and bad results. This one has had the best result of all the ones I've tried. At first I was not too keen on the lace aspect, but the over the ear hoops for the face and extra length for the neck area piqued my interest enough to buy my first pack. After cleansing, toner and misting on essence is applied, I put the mask on for 20 minutes and finish up with my serum and moisturizer. The mask is saturated with liquid so I take the backing and what is left in the packet and rub on my hands, arms and décolletage. The serum soaks right into the skin leaving it soft and free of any stickiness. The next day your skin will look even better. I try to do two a week and have ordered the yogurt twice, the other brightening one and the papaya (regular sheet mask). I will continue to keep in rotation as they do work well, don't break me out and are priced and packed for convenience.
UPDATE!!! 12/09/2016-I have ordered this mask numerous times and it has gotten progressively worse with each order. This time the mask lace was brown in color, smelled really bad and spoiled and medicinal(never had this before) yet the expire date on the packet was 20181027. Needless to say it went straight in the garbage. I don't know what is going on with this vendor but I will not be ordering this again. [5.0/5] Best brand here on amazon hands down. Best customer service as well! These are simply amazing! All of the Hey! Pinkgo Girl masks are though. Just incredible! [5.0/5] Super moist, reduces acne scars, and dries out pimples! Super moist! They drip while on my face! They're that moist!
After one use my acne scars were visibly lighter and my skin was glowing.
They're an essential part of my skincare routine now(:
Also idk why but it slightly dries out active pimples while still hydrating my face, It's so cool. [5.0/5] works amazing on my skin and the ear straps are great works amazing on my skin and the ear straps are great. i never have to worry about the mask sliding off. [5.0/5] Will purchase again! My face has been greatly improved since I started using this mask. During the weather change my skin turned so dry, flaky and itchy that the makeup didn't stay. This rich sheet mask provides so much moisture and nutrients, and fix those problems on my face. I just finished my first box and will definitely purchase again! [5.0/5] High quality five-star sheet mask I absolutely love this lace sheet mask mask! My face tends to be dull and dry due to the lack of sleep. This mask never disappointed me. It made my skin glowing and looking healthy. I also noticed some of my dark spots are less visible. So glad my face can improve so much just by putting the mask on! Love love it! Do yourself a favor and give it a try! [2.0/5] Cool, but not effective Cool concept as a mask, its so pretty, but I don't see any noticeable results. I like this brand after buying the "Hey! Pinkgo Girl black rose collagen mask, so decided to try this because its more expensive and fancy, but the cheaper ones worked way better on me. These are kind of too thick, which makes me feel like nothing is actually being transferred onto my skin. It doesnt absorb the liquid from the bag and transfer it onto my face - i feel like it just absorbs all the liquid into the mask itself! Stay with the cheaper ones! [5.0/5] Five Stars Amazzzing! Will auto-order these for sure! [5.0/5] Five Stars Works great and Brightens immediately, the yogurt does the trick in the masks!! [4.0/5] Great product,instant result I like this product very much,my skin feel very soft and smooth.it's fully soaked in serum,my skin look glowing also.truly love this product.but it's little bit costly

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, most customers are very happy with these lace sheet face masks, with the majority giving 5-star ratings. Reviewers frequently praise the unique lace design, which includes ear straps that keep the mask securely in place, solving a common problem with traditional paper masks sliding around. Many users report noticeable improvements in skin hydration, softness, and glow after just one use, with some noting reduced acne scars and dark spots.

Customers appreciate the generous amount of serum in each mask, with many applying the excess to their hands, arms, and neck. The masks are generally described as easy to use and suitable for busy people looking for a quick self-care routine. The packaging also received positive mentions for being cute and appealing.

On the negative side, a few reviewers had complaints. One customer with sensitive skin experienced small bumps after use and cautioned others with sensitive skin to be careful. Another felt the mask was too small and did not deliver noticeable results. One reviewer found the lace too thick, feeling it absorbed the serum rather than transferring it to the skin.

The most concerning review came from a long-time repeat customer who noticed the product quality declining over multiple orders, eventually receiving a mask that was discolored and had a bad smell, leading them to stop purchasing altogether.
